irt.gate: IRT placement requires human-anchored, psychometrically meaningful items and response data

sfs.gate: Selective Flip Score requires targeted, mismatched, and generic feedback generations over the same seeded misconception
sfs.interpretation: Near-zero selectivity means the simulated learner corrects after irrelevant/generic feedback as readily as after targeted feedback.
sfs.nextStep: Carry this as a synthetic-learner validity bound into the pilot go-memo; do not treat it as human learning evidence.
